name: ForzeBreak
developer: Swift Limit Games, Miguel O. Mercado, Jason Lin, Boyang Zhou, Xiaoyu Yang, Zihang Zhang, Martha Magsombol, Jairus Cambe, Alan “AG” Gordon, Matthew Eis
short_description: A vehicle brawler in which players use acrobatics and special items to knock their opponents off the arena in a fast paced competitive match to become the ultimate fighter!
